table.title: Table
table.description: Powerful table with sorting, pagination, selection, sticky header, expandable rows and tree support. Columns are defined with key + accessor.

props.columns: Column definitions (key, header, accessor, sortable, align…).
props.rowKey: Unique row identifier used by v-for and selection.
props.size: Font size and base row height.
props.striped: Applies an alternating background to even rows.
props.hover: Highlights the row under the cursor.
props.stickyHeader: Keeps the header visible while scrolling vertically.
props.pageSize: Enables client-side pagination with the given page size.

emits.updateSort: Emitted when column sort order changes.
emits.updatePagination: Emitted when the page or page size changes.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Default configuration with four columns and standard typography.

striped.title: Striped + bordered
striped.desc: Alternating rows and full borders for easier reading in dense tables.

sort.title: With sorting
sort.desc: Mark any column as sortable to enable ascending / descending order.

compact.title: Compact density
compact.desc: Reduces vertical padding to show more rows in less space.

stickyHeader.title: Sticky header
stickyHeader.desc: The header stays fixed while scrolling inside the container.
